description: The MergedWorldDataItemInterface component is used to display world details from a WorldsDataFeed.

fields.IsMerged: The field to drive with whether or not the source data feed item was merged.
fields.SessionCount: The field to drive with the amount of sessions in this set of worlds.
fields.WorldCount: The field to drive with the amount of Merged worlds into this item.
fields.MainName: The field to drive with the main world name of this Merged item.
fields.MainThumbnail: The field to drive with the main world's thumbnail of this Merged item.
fields.WorldOrSessionId: The field to drive with the main world or session ID of this Merged item.
fields.TotalAggregateActiveUsers: The field to drive with the total active users of all the worlds Merged into this item.
fields.TotalAggregateContacts: The field to drive with the total users that are contacts in all the worlds Merged into this item.
fields.Sessions: The list of item templates to instantiate with session info from this merged item.
fields.Worlds: The list of item templates to instantiate with the world data of this merged item.

usage: Used in data feed Template generating systems. See Data Feeds.
